name: Cranberry Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Thoroughly cream together the sugar and shortening.
2. Beat in the eggs.
3. Sift the dry ingredients (flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda) into a separate bowl.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the sugar and shortening mixture alternately with the buttermilk, beating until smooth and fluffy.
5. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (orange flavoring, cranberries, dates, and nuts) to the batter.
6. Grease a bundt cake pan and pour the batter into it.
7. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about one hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Let the cake stand in the pan for 15 minutes before turning it out onto a plate.
9. The cake can be glazed with a thin powdered sugar icing flavored with orange flavoring.
10. Alternatively, combine 1 cup sugar, 1 cup orange juice, and 1/4 tsp orange flavoring; bring to a boil and pour over the warm cake.
11. Let set several hours before serving.
